art_market.summary: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 is officially underway (March 27-29). Echoes and Zero 10 platforms are the new highlights.
top_stories: Art Basel HK 2026 at HKCEC features 240 galleries; strong early sales reported.
New curation platforms 'Echoes' and digital art section 'Zero 10' debut in Asia.
High-value transactions include Picasso (€3.5M) and Liu Ye ($3.8M).
Korean artists, including Lee Bul and Kim Yun-shin, showing strong market performance.

stock_market.summary: KOSPI closed lower at 5,361.29 (-1.8%) amid continued volatility and geopolitical tensions.
key_factors: Market remains volatile due to Middle East geopolitical risks affecting global sentiment.
Investors maintaining cautious stance moving into the weekend.
